home.heroText: Welcome to my world of handmade ceramics, where passion meets creative chaos. From my cozy kitchen studio in Warsaw, I hand-sculpt and hand-paint unique, one-of-a-kind pieces.
home.aboutText: Every piece is made by hand, with care and attention to every detail. Functional ceramics that combine simplicity of form with the warmth of the material.
